headline: Stay Ahead of the Game With Northern Trust (NTRS) Q2 Earnings: Wall Street's Insights on Key Metrics
summary: Get a deeper insight into the potential performance of Northern Trust (NTRS) for the quarter ended June 2026 by going beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining the estimates for some of its key metrics.

summary: NTRS heads into Q2 results with expectations for double-digit revenue growth, higher fee income and a strong earnings beat streak.

headline: Harding Loevner Launches International Developed Markets Select Equity ETF
summary: BRIDGEWATER, N.J., July 20, 2026--Harding Loevner, a global equity asset management firm, today announced the launch of the International Developed Markets Select Equity ETF (NYSE: LOEV). The actively managed ETF offers investors access to the firm's established International Developed Markets strategy through a new, more tax-efficient vehicle. Northern Trust will serve as the fund administrator and custodian for the ETF.

headline: Strategy Shares Announces Edward Rosenberg as Head of ETFs
summary: Rosenberg Brings 25+ Years of Experience to Lead ETF Platform for Fund FamilyNEW YORK, July 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Strategy Shares, a provider of alternative investment solutions, announced Edward Rosenberg as Head of ETFs, effective today. Mr. Rosenberg joins Strategy Shares from Russell Investments, where he was most recently the Head of ETF Products & Capital Markets.
